## Plan entries

### A. [tool] Extend per-directory AGENTS.md system-reminders to write/edit/multiedit/grep

- **Files to modify**:
  - `src/tool/tools/edit.ts` — after the successful `fs.writeFile` (line ~117) and before `gitManager.onFileChanged`, call `instructionsForPath(filePath, context.workdir, context.agentsMdSeen)` (guarded on `context.agentsMdSeen`) and attach to `toolResult.metadata.systemReminders` using the same shape as `read.ts:69-75`.
  - `src/tool/tools/multiedit.ts` — same pattern after the atomic write completes.
  - `src/tool/tools/write.ts` — same pattern after the successful write.
  - `src/tool/tools/grep.ts` — for each unique parent directory of a match, attach one reminder (bounded by `agentsMdSeen` so a hot directory only fires once per session). Skip when `agentsMdSeen` is missing.
- **Approach**: factor a tiny helper `attachAgentsMdReminders(result, absPath, context)` (already exists in `read.ts` as a private function — extract into `src/agent/system.ts` or a new `src/agent/agentsMdReminders.ts`) so all four tools share it without copy-paste.
- **Tests**: mirror `src/tool/tools/__tests__/read.agentsmd.test.ts`. One file each:
  - `src/tool/tools/__tests__/edit.agentsmd.test.ts`
  - `src/tool/tools/__tests__/multiedit.agentsmd.test.ts`
  - `src/tool/tools/__tests__/write.agentsmd.test.ts`
  - `src/tool/tools/__tests__/grep.agentsmd.test.ts`
  - Tmp workdir, write `apps/api/AGENTS.md`, invoke tool against `apps/api/src/foo.ts`, assert one reminder; second invocation should not re-emit (per-session `seen` honoured).
- **Size**: small (< 4h)

### B. [plugin] Plugin rule contributions — `command` source with timeout/size bounds and per-session caching

- **Depends on**: #595 (schema + inline/file). Do not start until #595 lands.
- **Files to modify** (create after #595 sets up the schema):
  - `src/plugin/index.ts` — extend the rule loader to handle `source: 'command'`.
  - `src/plugin/ruleCommandRunner.ts` (new) — spawn helper with 5s timeout, 32 KB stdout cap, cwd = plugin root, env passthrough minus secrets.
  - `src/agent/system.ts` — extend the system-prompt assembly path to consume command-sourced rule content (keyed cache).
- **Approach**: spawn with `child_process.execFile` (no shell), enforce timeout via `AbortController`, cap stdout via a counting pipe. Cache result keyed by `(pluginId, ruleName, scope)` where `scope: 'session' | 'always'`; `'always'` caches once per process lifetime, `'session'` caches per active session id (fetched from `sessionManager.getActiveSession()?.metadata.id`).
- **Tests**: `src/plugin/__tests__/ruleCommand.test.ts`
  - successful command → output reaches system prompt
  - timeout → rule omitted, error logged, other rules still load
  - oversized stdout → truncated at 32 KB with a single-line note
  - `scope: 'session'` cache: same session reuses, different session re-spawns
  - `scope: 'always'` cache: subsequent calls do not re-spawn
- **Size**: small (< 4h once #595's schema exists)
